# Argentina vs. Switzerland projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup 2026 quarterfinal game in Kansas City

Kyle Bonn

•

SN

Add The Sporting News on Google

Lionel Messi and Argentina continue their quest to defend their FIFA World Cup title as they take on Switerland, their second European opponent of the 2026 tournament, in Kansas City on Saturday evening.

The Albiceleste have not been beaten in the knockout stage of a World Cup since their 4-3 defeat to France in the 2018 Round of 16.

Messi has carried this team once again, currently leading the World Cup Golden Boot race as he
highlights: Paredes — 7. De Paul, 20. Mac Allister — 24. E. Fernandez — 10. Messi, 9. Alvarez. Injured: None; Suspended: ...

news_items.text:
Argentina vs Switzerland FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview: Everything you need to know | Goal.com US

WATCH SECURELY FROM ANYWHERE

Jul 11, 2026 12:37+03:00

TV Guide & Streaming

Argentina vs Switzerland

Argentina

Switzerland

World Cup

Comprehensive match preview of Argentina vs Switzerland at World Cup 2026. We talk tactics, team news and more ahead of this quarter-final clash in Kansas City.

### Argentina vs Switzerland: Match details

World Cup - Quarter Finals

Kansas City Stadium

Argentina vs Switzerland will kick-off on 12 July 2026 at 01:00 GMT and 21:00 EST (11 July).

Read more: World Cup 2026 Golden Boot standings: Lionel Messi moves ahead of Kylian Mbappe & Erling Haaland in thrilling battle for top scorer prize

Getty Images

### Reigning champions hunt final-four spot against resilient Swiss block

A captivating David vs Goliath narrative takes centre stage in the quarter-finals as reigning world champions Argentina face a disciplined Switzerland side at the Kansas City Stadium. Lionel Scaloni leads an experienced La Albiceleste team that continues to display immense steel, digging deep into their technical and psychological reserves to maintain a dramatic, unrelenti
highlights: Argentina are managed by Lionel Scaloni, though no confirmed injury or suspension information is currently available for the quarter-final.

# Argentina vs. Switzerland projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup 2026 quarterfinal game in Kansas City

Kyle Bonn

•

SN

Add The Sporting News on Google

Lionel Messi and Argentina continue their quest to defend their FIFA World Cup title as they take on Switerland, their second European opponent of the 2026 tournament, in Kansas City on Saturday evening.

The Albiceleste have not been beaten in the knockout stage of a World Cup since their 4-3 defeat to France in the 2018 Round of 16.

Messi has carried this team once again, currently leading the World Cup Golden Boot race as he"}

Comprehensive match preview of Argentina vs Switzerland at World Cup 2026. We talk tactics, team news and more ahead of this quarter-final clash in Kansas City.

### Argentina vs Switzerland: Match details

World Cup - Quarter Finals

Kansas City Stadium

Argentina vs Switzerland will kick-off on 12 July 2026 at 01:00 GMT and 21:00 EST (11 July).

Read more: World Cup 2026 Golden Boot standings: Lionel Messi moves ahead of Kylian Mbappe & Erling Haaland in thrilling battle for top scorer prize

Getty Images

### Reigning champions hunt final-four spot against resilient Swiss block

A captivating David vs Goliath narrative takes centre stage in the quarter-finals as reigning world champions Argentina face a disciplined Switzerland side at the Kansas City Stadium.
